elder_guardian.title: Defeat an Elder Guardian (Ocean Monument boss — drops Sponge + unique Ocean Monument loot)

subtitle.text: The Elder Guardian inflicts Mining Fatigue III. You cannot mine the Monument while it lives. Kill it first.

description: CH.08 · THE MONUMENT
▸ The Ocean Monument is the oldest structure
in the ocean biome.
It was built before the age of tools.
The Guardians are still protecting it
from whatever it was protecting against.
◈ OCEAN MONUMENT STRATEGY
└ 3 Elder Guardians spawn inside — kill all 3
Mining Fatigue III is removed after all 3 are dead
└ Approach: Night Vision + Water Breathing potions
└ Elder Guardian attack: laser beam (high damage),
thorn spikes (melee retaliation)
└ Counter: hit and swim back out of range,
use crossbow/bow from medium distance
└ Goldfish weakness: Milk cures Mining Fatigue
(bring milk for the swim in)
◈ MONUMENT LOOT
└ Sponge: dry the interior for farming/building
└ Gold Block: 8 blocks in central room
└ Guardian scales: rare drop (alex's mobs variant)
└ Architecture: build a base here — best ocean hub
◈ END REMASTERED EYE
└ One of the custom End Eyes comes from this area
└ Eye of the Cold: found in cold ocean structures
└ Monument may contain a cold eye variant
(Ch09 Eye Hunt requires locating it)
▸ The Monument was built to hide the gold.
The Guardians were built to protect the gold.
The gold does not know why any of this happened.
▶ Defeat an Elder Guardian [check]
▶ Collect 8 Sponge
◇ After clearing the Monument, drain it with Sponge.
The interior becomes the best underwater base in the game.
Build it out. Ch09 needs a staging point.
